transcript_facts:
Patient Intent:
- injured knee

Pertinent Positives:
- injured knee | evidence: hi gregory how are you i the medical assistant told me that you injured your knee
- ankle soreness | evidence: to the outside and i thought my ankle was the thing that was gon na hurt most but after the ankle soreness went away the only my knee hurt and it sort of clicks when i walk
- pain | evidence: okay and what have you taken for the pain || it's it it makes it feel better in the morning when i first go to my desk and at the end of the day before bed you know i take ibuprofen so i do n't have swelling overnight but honestly i have a pretty decent threshold for pain so it's not good it's not changing it by much || okay alright well let's go ahead and refer you to physical therapy if you're still having pain then we might have to consider an mri
- ibuprofen | evidence: ibuprofen but i'm not a big pill taker so i sort of sucked it up and || does the ibuprofen work || it's it it makes it feel better in the morning when i first go to my desk and at the end of the day before bed you know i take ibuprofen so i do n't have swelling overnight but honestly i have a pretty decent threshold for pain so it's not good it's not changing it by much
- numbing | evidence: i ca n't picture you as a regade person so that's interesting to know okay alright and any numbing or tingling in your foot at all
- tingling in foot | evidence: i ca n't picture you as a regade person so that's interesting to know okay alright and any numbing or tingling in your foot at all
- knee injury | evidence: yes but not from the knee injury i broke my foot my second toe on my right foot and i have numbness depending upon the shoe i wear
- numbness | evidence: yes but not from the knee injury i broke my foot my second toe on my right foot and i have numbness depending upon the shoe i wear
- injury | evidence: i've broken it three times over the last ten years so it's just something that's a an annoyance but it was n't caused by this injury
- numbing and tingling | evidence: okay so you do have some numbing and tingling but it's not new
- exam findings | evidence: alright alright well let's just go ahead and i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam i'm gon na be calling out my exam findings i'll let you know what that means so on your musculoskeletal exam on your right knee i do appreciate some slight edema you do have a slight effusion does it hurt when i press on the outside of your knee
- musculoskeletal exam on right knee | evidence: alright alright well let's just go ahead and i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam i'm gon na be calling out my exam findings i'll let you know what that means so on your musculoskeletal exam on your right knee i do appreciate some slight edema you do have a slight effusion does it hurt when i press on the outside of your knee
- physical exam | evidence: alright alright well let's just go ahead and i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam i'm gon na be calling out my exam findings i'll let you know what that means so on your musculoskeletal exam on your right knee i do appreciate some slight edema you do have a slight effusion does it hurt when i press on the outside of your knee
- slight edema | evidence: alright alright well let's just go ahead and i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam i'm gon na be calling out my exam findings i'll let you know what that means so on your musculoskeletal exam on your right knee i do appreciate some slight edema you do have a slight effusion does it hurt when i press on the outside of your knee
- slight effusion | evidence: alright alright well let's just go ahead and i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam i'm gon na be calling out my exam findings i'll let you know what that means so on your musculoskeletal exam on your right knee i do appreciate some slight edema you do have a slight effusion does it hurt when i press on the outside of your knee
- swelling | evidence: it's it it makes it feel better in the morning when i first go to my desk and at the end of the day before bed you know i take ibuprofen so i do n't have swelling overnight but honestly i have a pretty decent threshold for pain so it's not good it's not changing it by much
- symptoms | evidence: okay do you feel like your symptoms are getting worse or better i think i think pretty much for the last two weeks they've remained about the same the the only time i feel like they get worse is when i exert myself doing up and down like gardening in the yard or moving pots
- mri | evidence: okay alright well let's go ahead and refer you to physical therapy if you're still having pain then we might have to consider an mri
- physical therapy | evidence: okay alright well let's go ahead and refer you to physical therapy if you're still having pain then we might have to consider an mri

Pertinent Negatives:
- hurt | evidence: no when it's up it's fine when it's down on the floor with my foot flat it's fine it does hurt when i rest it on my heel
- clicking | evidence: a full squat that's when i feel the most clicking like if i go all the way down to a full squat like a catcher that's when i feel the most clicking but otherwise no there is no pain it's just the clicking and i'm fearful that that's an injury of some type
- injury | evidence: a full squat that's when i feel the most clicking like if i go all the way down to a full squat like a catcher that's when i feel the most clicking but otherwise no there is no pain it's just the clicking and i'm fearful that that's an injury of some type
- pain | evidence: a full squat that's when i feel the most clicking like if i go all the way down to a full squat like a catcher that's when i feel the most clicking but otherwise no there is no pain it's just the clicking and i'm fearful that that's an injury of some type || okay there is no pain to palpation of the right lateral knee i'm gon na be bending your knee in all sorts of positions does that hurt
- palpation of right lateral knee | evidence: okay there is no pain to palpation of the right lateral knee i'm gon na be bending your knee in all sorts of positions does that hurt

Medical History:
- acute fracture | evidence: okay the patient has a positive varus test there is full range of motion there is a negative lachman sign the patient does on cardiovascular exam the patient does have a palpable dorsalis pedis and posterior tibialis pulse okay well let's just i wan na talk a little bit about i had the nurse do an x-ray on you and i looked at the results of your knee x-ray and it does n't show any acute fracture or bony abnormality which is not surprising based on your injury so let's just talk a little bit about you know my assessment and my plan for you so i think you do have a a lateral a lateral collateral ligament strain based on your exam findings and this this type of injury essentially can be healed by itself you know i do n't think we're gon na need to refer you to surgery or anything like that i want you to go ahead and i'm gon na prescribe meloxicam fifteen milligrams once a day i do wan na go ahead and refer you to physical therapy because if we strengthen up those muscles and areas around that injury then that will make your knee stronger it help prevent future injuries are you able to ice it at all during the day now you said you working you work in sales so you said you're home
